Feedback: The smart thermostat is extremely easy to install and saves me a lot of energy. Best purchase of the year. (Ref: #3000)
The smart doorbell battery drain is too fast. I have to recharge it every two weeks. (Ref: #3001)
Thermostat setup app keeps crashing on my iPhone when searching for Bluetooth devices. (Ref: #3002)
Integration with Alexa and Google Assistant is seamless. My smart speaker responds instantly. (Ref: #3003)
The motion sensors are lagging by 10 seconds before sending notifications to my phone. (Ref: #3004)
The security camera video feed is crystal clear, even at night. Highly recommend the smart floodlight. (Ref: #3005)
The device keeps losing connection to my home WiFi router. Synced sensors keep going offline. (Ref: #3006)
Love the schedule options on the smart plug, works perfectly for my morning coffee machine. (Ref: #3007)
Camera battery calibration is broken, it drops from 40% to zero in an hour. (Ref: #3008)
Smart lock drains batteries within a month, very inconvenient. (Ref: #3009)
Smart speaker voice recognition is poor, it ignores my commands and triggers randomly. (Ref: #3010)
Cannot connect smart display to my Spotify account, setup interface freezes. (Ref: #3011)
The smart lighting hubs are super fast to configure, wall switches sync automatically. (Ref: #3012)
The smart camera keeps dropping frames and buffering live feeds. WiFi antenna is too weak. (Ref: #3013)
Automatic firmware update bricked my security hub, now none of my locks respond. (Ref: #3014)
App UI is too cluttered, searching for connected sensors takes way too many taps. (Ref: #3015)
Motion detection is too sensitive, it sends alerts for every passing moth or leaf. (Ref: #3016)
The smart hub sounds alerts for smoke instantly, great security system. (Ref: #3017)
The speaker sound is hollow, and the volume level control is very clunky in the app. (Ref: #3018)

Great integration with my Apple HomeKit, Siri toggles the smart locks instantly. (Ref: #3023)
Setup app is full of ads, and requires my location enabled permanently just to sync plugs. (Ref: #3024)

Excellent smart home kit! Lights, doorbell, and thermostats all coordinate perfectly. (Ref: #3026)
Firmware upgrade added great new smart routines. Battery efficiency improved by 20%. (Ref: #3027)
